title: Vanilla Bean
description: A tried and true classic! Made with whole Madagascar vanilla beans, it's the perfect scoop.

title: Chocolate Oreo
description: One of our favorite chocolate ice creams! Addictive Oreo pieces riddled through creamy milk chocolate ice cream-- simple and delicious.

title: S’mores
description: A quintessential summer scoop! Marshmallow ice cream riddled with graham crackers, chocolate chips, and mini marshmallows.

title: Mayan Hot Chocolate
description: With hints of cayenne and cinnamon, this rich ice cream is ultra-chocolaty and delicious...with a kick!

title: Horchata
description: One of our Cinco de Mayo flavors! Fashioned after the classic Latin American drink, this one's made with rice milk, cinnamon, and sweet almond to create a creamy and refreshing scoop.

title: Pink Dragon Fruit
description: Our pink dragon fruit ice cream is subtly fruity and sweet, and SO gorgeous. The all-natural hue comes solely from the dragon fruit!

title: Avocado
description: Ultra creamy, mellow, and sweet-- it's a surprisingly delicious scoop.

title: Vegan Coconut Latte
description: Vegan, gluten-free, and so delicious. Made with Oak Roaster's espresso beans, this tastes like the best coconut latte you've ever had.
